unique_vulnerabilities.name: Controlled array length manipulation
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings reference the same issue of user-controlled array length manipulation in the dividends array.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Reentrancy in multiple functions
unique_vulnerabilities.location: Multiple functions (playSystem, coldStore, invest, pay), various lines
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings describe reentrancy vulnerabilities due to external calls followed by state changes in different functions.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Incorrect equality checks
unique_vulnerabilities.location: Multiple functions (betOf, betPrize, putHash, won, addHashes), various lines
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: All findings highlight dangerous strict equality checks that could lead to logical errors or vulnerabilities.
